changes.value:
## What
Move the CLI generation and argument extraction utilities out of `swissarmyhammer-cli` (where they're private methods on `DynamicCli`/`CliExecutor`) into `swissarmyhammer-tools` so that `kanban-cli` can reuse them without duplicating code.

**Functions to extract (from `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/dynamic_cli.rs`):**
- `CommandData`, `ArgData` structs (lines ~1050-1070)
- `precompute_tool_command(tool: &dyn McpTool)` â†’ `Option<CommandData>`
- `create_command_data_from_tool()`, `create_noun_command_data()`, `create_verb_command_data()`
- `build_tool_subcommand_from_data(name, data)` â†’ `clap::Command`
- `precompute_args(schema)` â†’ `Vec<ArgData>`
- `SchemaParser::parse_arg_data()` and related schemaâ†’arg conversion

**Functions to extract (from `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/cli_executor.rs`):**
- `extract_noun_verb_arguments(matches, schema)` â†’ `Map<String, Value>`
- `build_arguments_from_matches(matches, op_string, schema)` â†’ `Map<String, Value>`
- `extract_value_from_matches(matches, name, schema)` â†’ `Option<Value>`

**Target location:** `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/cli_gen.rs` (new module)

**Modify:** `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/dynamic_cli.rs` and `cli_executor.rs` â€” call the shared functions instead of private methods

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `CommandData`, `ArgData`, CLI generation, and arg extraction are public in `swissarmyhammer-tools`
- [ ] `sah tool kanban` still works identically (same CLI structure, same execution)
- [ ] Functions are usable from outside `swissarmyhammer-cli`

## Tests
- [ ] Existing `sah` CLI tests pass: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-cli`
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
Extract CLI generation utilities from swissarmyhammer-cli into swissarmyhammer-tools

 ## What
Move the CLI generation and argument extraction utilities out of `swissarmyhammer-cli` (where they're private methods on `DynamicCli`/`CliExecutor`) into `swissarmyhammer-tools` so that `kanban-cli` can reuse them without duplicating code.

**Functions to extract (from `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/dynamic_cli.rs`):**
- `CommandData`, `ArgData` structs (lines ~1050-1070)
- `precompute_tool_command(tool: &dyn McpTool)` â†’ `Option<CommandData>`
- `create_command_data_from_tool()`, `create_noun_command_data()`, `create_verb_command_data()`
- `build_tool_subcommand_from_data(name, data)` â†’ `clap::Command`
- `precompute_args(schema)` â†’ `Vec<ArgData>`
- `SchemaParser::parse_arg_data()` and related schemaâ†’arg conversion

**Functions to extract (from `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/cli_executor.rs`):**
- `extract_noun_verb_arguments(matches, schema)` â†’ `Map<String, Value>`
- `build_arguments_from_matches(matches, op_string, schema)` â†’ `Map<String, Value>`
- `extract_value_from_matches(matches, name, schema)` â†’ `Option<Value>`

**Target location:** `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/cli_gen.rs` (new module)

**Modify:** `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/dynamic_cli.rs` and `cli_executor.rs` â€” call the shared functions instead of private methods

- [ ] `sah tool kanban` still works identically (same CLI structure, same execution)
